specify.reviewerNotes: Specify completed after 5 spec-reviewer iters + 3 phase-reviewer iters. Final state: approved with 1 residual suggestion on FR-3.3 test naming (db_none return value — empty list vs unfiltered list).

design.reviewerNotes: Design completed after 2 design-reviewer iters (iter 1: 3 blockers + 2 warnings + 3 suggestions; iter 2: clean PASS) and 2 phase-reviewer iters (iter 1: 2 warnings + 2 suggestions; iter 2: clean PASS). All blockers/warnings resolved at spec time, design time, or spec backward-travel (TD-8 schema enumeration backward-travelled to spec FR-1.2).

create-plan.reviewerNotes: create-plan combined loop converged in 2 iterations. plan-reviewer: iter1 (2B+5W), iter2 (2W+2S), iter3 PASS. task-reviewer: iter1 (3B+3W+2S), iter2 PASS. phase-reviewer chain: iter1 (2W+2S), iter2 PASS. Spec backward-traveled: AC-4 5-test count + qa_gate root-fields enumeration.
